## Paper Correction

### Paper ID
`qqc-NNN-slug`

### Current version
e.g. `1.0.0`

### Type of correction
- [ ] Typo in paper text (patch: x.x.N)
- [ ] Error in claims.json, notation.json, or glossary.json
- [ ] Error in references.bib
- [ ] Error in metadata.json (non-identifying field)
- [ ] Error in a mathematical result — requires re-review
- [ ] Retraction request

### Description of the error
<!-- Describe the error precisely. Include section, equation, or claim ID if applicable. -->

### Proposed correction
<!-- What the correct text, value, or content should be. -->

### Impact on downstream papers
<!-- Does this correction affect results cited in later papers in the series? -->

### Notes
<!-- Any additional context, references, or discussion -->
